title: Shulk
body:
![Shulk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8ef4553b46dfd8ade6b0ea59d8eed4defa2f427.png)

**Shulk** is a lightweight mod that lets you access Shulker Boxes directly from your inventory. It also ensures that Shulker Boxes display their correct custom names, whether they're in your inventory or placed in the world.
